data.body: ALIGNMENT WITH EXISTING EVAL INFRA (do NOT build from scratch). rebar already has: (1) the Inspect-AI/promptfoo EVAL SEAM (workflow WS-G, commit 036f500); (2) a per-criterion plan-review eval suite in src/rebar/llm/eval_specs/*.eval.yaml (built under epic 5fd2 messy-moose-jig, CLOSED) with discrimination/recall fixtures for A1/E2/E5/E6/F4/G5/G6/T2/T12 — but NOT G3/G4 (the container criteria are a COVERAGE GAP); (3) src/rebar/llm/parity.py 'parallel-run-and-diff' (ItemRecord/parity_report/_recall_false_accept: recall+false-accept on a gold set with min_gold certification) — exactly the old-vs-new diff S6 needs. ALIGNS WITH epic 6f2d soupy-spool-revel (OPEN) WS-EVAL-EXISTING — 'parallel-run-and-diff old vs new made into a standing eval' over the DSO/snap-oakhart/rebar corpuses; S6 is a specific instance of that discipline for the container path. ALSO 9da1 sheer-myth-idol (three-pass realign + Inspect seam) and 3156 oaken-golem-rash (project criteria eval-gated). RE-SCOPE S6: extend the eval_specs suite with G3/G4 merged-vs-separate + packed-vs-per-child cases, reuse parity.py's recall metric + the Inspect seam + the shared corpuses; coordinate with 6f2d WS-EVAL-EXISTING rather than duplicate.
